title: Yijing Hexagram 4: Meng (Youthful Folly)
description: Hexagram 4 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 4 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Youthful folly has success. It is not I who seek the young fool; the young fool seeks me. At the first oracle I inform him.
